title: Corybas aristatus
taxonomy: Corybas aristatus is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This genus, Corybas, is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Australia and New Zealand. The classification of Corybas aristatus is further categorized under the subfamily Diurideae. uses: Corybas aristatus, commonly known as the helmet orchid, has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
